legal_aspects.name: beneficiary-trustee-conflict
legal_aspects.definition:
Trustee who is also beneficiary has inherent conflict of interest in 
               distribution decisions affecting co-beneficiaries, requiring heightened 
               scrutiny of trustee actions and decisions

legal_aspects.name: abuse-of-trustee-powers
legal_aspects.definition:
Trustee exercises powers for improper purpose or personal benefit rather 
               than for benefit of beneficiaries and proper trust administration

legal_aspects.name: material-non-disclosure-ex-parte
legal_aspects.definition:
Applicant in ex parte application has duty of utmost good faith to disclose 
               all material facts, including those adverse to application. Failure to do so 
               warrants setting aside of order obtained.

legal_aspects.name: nominal-director-without-actual-control
legal_aspects.definition:
Director with formal title but no actual operational, financial, or technical 
               control over company operations. Substance-over-form principle applies to 
               determine actual authority and standing.

legal_aspects.name: beneficiary-trustee-conflict
legal_aspects.definition: Trustee who is also beneficiary has conflict in distribution decisions affecting co-beneficiaries

legal_aspects.name: trust-power-abuse
legal_aspects.definition: Trustee exercises discretionary powers for improper purpose rather than trust objectives

legal_aspects.name: abuse-of-process
legal_aspects.definition: Using court process for purpose other than legitimate dispute resolution

legal_aspects.name: manufactured-urgency
legal_aspects.definition: Creating false sense of urgency to justify ex parte or urgent relief

legal_aspects.name: whistleblower-retaliation
legal_aspects.definition: Retaliation against party for providing transparency or reporting concerns

legal_aspects.name: business-judgment-rule
legal_aspects.definition: Directors have discretion in business decisions when acting in good faith and in company's best interests
